response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video to identify scenes: 00:00-01:31 (Group performance), 01:32-01:36 (Talk), 01:37-05:01 (Solo performance). 2. Used search to identify songs: 'Our Bright Parade' for the first scene and 'Shirube' for the third scene. 3. Confirmed performers: 'hololive IDOL PROJECT' for the first and 'Tokoyami Towa' for the third. 4. Obtained full lyrics for both songs from reliable sources. 5. Constructed the JSON object according to instructions, ensuring correct timestamps, original composer credit, and escaped lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video of a hololive concert featuring a group performance of 'Our Bright Parade' followed by a solo performance of 'Shirube' by Tokoyami Towa.

scenes.description: A group of hololive VTubers perform 'Our Bright Parade'.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Parade, Parade, Parade! Shine, with the sound of calling each other as a signal. Parade, Parade, Parade! How many times did you start looking for it?

Just talking to myself I just wanted to start and ran. It lit up far away. That's an overly dazzling name. That's too tender to remember more. Come closer and hold out your hand. Combine unexpectedly. at present Where are the lost people? Became "we"

Parade, Parade, Parade! Shine bar Come with regret and love Wind, dreams, wings I will jump up. A little prayer is bright Endless signs Find you. Stand up. Start from here next Our Bright Parade, Parade!

The hunch is not reliable yet Sing, there's nothing to be ashamed of. An illusion that no one can solve Witchcraft that will meet again one day The story from scratch that day Countless words Not a handful of ideas. at present Put "we" Call one.

Parade, Parade, Parade! It's beautiful The moment of mutual forgiveness Shining at night Rain, sunny, Carredo The unpredictable sky What is a suitable trip? Together with you Is to be with you

If you ask "I'm back" Say "welcome back" Isn't this a matter of course?

Parade, Parade, Parade! Shine bar To satisfy the darkness, It's you, it's me!

Parade, Parade, Parade! Shine bar Come with regret and love Wind, dreams, wings I will jump up. A little prayer is bright Endless signs Jump in with you Great start. Start from here Our Bright Parade, Parade! Our Bright Parade, Parade!

scenes.description: A brief talk segment between performances.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Watch out!
Warning! Warning! Side by side
May God bless you, the nuances of words
Warning! Warning! While wandering
I will stay true to myself 'cause of you
Just like "from the beginning"
Caught in a world with nothing, bound by injustice
There is no fear that makes me fall silent
To the one who I let go of, as if tossing them aside
"You're completely different from yesterday"
Even if I understand that, it's pointless
My changing body and
The voice that echoes within my heart
I wasn't wrong
I'm simply staring at the sky
I still, every time we overlap
I can't help but remember
But am I just brushing it off?
Is it because of the regrets that were definitely there?
I must have sworn
Even saying goodbye, let's make it a guidepost
Every time I touch the light, I end up wishing
And still I rise!
There's no need to be stained
A border I can't cross
I'll convert my wavering will
In these days dyed with lies
When I look back, it's heartache
Another night breaks, wake up
The flavor within my dreams
I'm walking down the path where no one is left
To the present me, even confusion piles up
The true form of a fairy tale
The lies I couldn't hide
The warmth my heart wraps, illuminated by longing
I still, every time we overlap
I can't help but remember
But am I just brushing it off?
Is it because of the regrets that I've grown past?
On a moonlit night
Even saying goodbye, let's make it a guidepost
Every time I connect the light, like constellations floating in the sky
The path I've chosen, in the now
Even if the time comes when I regret it
I still won't stop
The moonlight floating in the night sky
I'll use the scattered stars above me
As my guide and return home
I still, every time we overlap
I can't help but remember
But am I just brushing it off?
Is it because of the regrets that were definitely there?
I must have sworn
Even saying goodbye, let's make it a guidepost
Every time I touch the light, I end up wishing
And still I rise!
There's no need to be stained
None of it is sorrow, it's a true embrace
